story.iWant: enhanced presentation mode with sidebar, keyboard nav, and smooth transitions
story.soThat: I have a polished, professional presentation experience

task.title: Add thumbnail sidebar to presentation mode
task.subtask: Add sidebar HTML structure to viewer-template.html
Style sidebar: 200px fixed width, dark background, vertical scroll
Generate mini-thumbnails using same iframe+scale technique
Highlight current slide with lime border
Click handler to jump to slide
Auto-scroll sidebar to keep current slide visible

task.title: Add CSS transitions for slide changes
task.subtask: Add opacity transition on presentation iframe (fade effect)
Add transition duration variable (~300ms)
Trigger transition on slide change (fade out → update src → fade in)

task.title: Implement full keyboard navigation
task.subtask: Add Home key handler → go to slide 1
Add End key handler → go to last slide
Add number keys 1-9 handler → jump to slide N (if exists)
Add F key handler → toggle fullscreen
Implement Fullscreen API with graceful fallback
Update keyboard hint text to show all shortcuts

task.title: Test and validate
task.subtask: Test sidebar navigation with 3+ slides
Test all keyboard shortcuts
Test transitions are smooth
Test fullscreen on Chrome, Firefox, Safari
Test with 10+ slides to verify sidebar scroll

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given I am in presentation mode, When I press ArrowRight, Then the next slide displays with a smooth transition
A thumbnail sidebar shows all slides with the current one highlighted
Clicking a sidebar thumbnail jumps to that slide
Number keys 1-9 jump to that slide

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Thumbnail sidebar (200px width fixed left), keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right, Escape, F, Home, End, 1-9), CSS transitions on iframe opacity for smooth slide changes, Fullscreen API with fallback.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Enhanced presentation mode with sidebar, keyboard nav, and smooth transitions. Depends on Story 8.2 Core Viewer Component.

artifact.reason: Primary file to modify - contains existing gallery and presentation views, basic keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right, Escape), slide state management (currentSlide), and presentation functions (enterPresentation, exitToGallery, nextSlide, prevSlide, updatePresentationSlide)
Reference for iframe thumbnail technique - uses scale(0.208) with 480% width/height for 16:9 preview. Adapt this pattern for sidebar mini-thumbnails at scale(0.1).
Theme colors to use: --amp-black (#0a0a0a), --amp-dark-alt (#1a1a1a), --amp-mid-gray (#2a2a2a), --amp-lime (#d4e94c) for highlight. 0px border radius (sharp corners).

frontend.note: No build tools - pure HTML/CSS/JS. Viewer is self-contained.

interface.name: slides array
interface.signature: const slides = [{number: N, filename: 'slide-N.html', title: 'Slide Title'}, ...]

interface.name: enterPresentation(slideNumber)
interface.signature: function enterPresentation(slideNumber) - Switches to presentation mode at given slide

interface.name: exitToGallery()
interface.signature: function exitToGallery() - Returns to gallery view from presentation mode

interface.name: updatePresentationSlide()
interface.signature: function updatePresentationSlide() - Updates iframe src and counter for current slide

interface.name: nextSlide() / prevSlide()
interface.signature: Navigation functions - increment/decrement currentSlide and update display

interface.name: goToSlide(n)
interface.signature: function goToSlide(n) - Jump directly to slide number n (to be implemented)

interface.name: toggleFullscreen()
interface.signature: function toggleFullscreen() - Toggle browser fullscreen using Fullscreen API

constraints.constraint: Use CSS custom properties for all colors (--amp-black, --amp-lime, etc.)
Keep corners sharp (0px border-radius per theme)
Use borders instead of shadows for visual separation
Sidebar width: 200px fixed left, dark background (#1a1a1a)
Must work in Chrome, Firefox, Safari (Fullscreen API with prefixes)
ES6+, const/let, arrow functions, template literals
HTML: 2-space indentation, single quotes in JS, double quotes in HTML attributes
No automated test framework - manual browser testing only

tests.standards: No automated test framework configured. Manual browser testing protocol: open index.html in browser, test all navigation paths, keyboard shortcuts, fullscreen mode, and viewport responsiveness.
tests.locations: Manual testing via browser DevTools console and visual inspection

ideas.idea: Test ArrowRight advances slide with visible fade transition (~300ms)
Verify sidebar visible at 200px width, all slides shown as mini-thumbnails
Click each sidebar thumbnail and verify main view jumps to that slide
Press Escape and verify return to gallery view
Press F and verify browser enters/exits fullscreen (test prefixes for Safari/Firefox)
Press keys 1-9 and verify jump to correct slide (or no-op if slide doesn't exist)
Press Home to verify jump to slide 1, End to verify jump to last slide
Test with 10+ slides to verify sidebar auto-scrolls to keep current slide visible
Verify slide counter updates on all navigation methods
Check browser DevTools console for JS errors during all interactions
